fields.label: Post lead (on-page intro)
fields.name: post_lead
fields.instructions: Optional intro under the title. When empty, the WordPress excerpt is used as plain text. Use this when the excerpt should stay short for SEO/cards but the article needs a longer lead.

fields.label: Breadcrumb parent (before Blog)
fields.name: breadcrumb_parent
fields.instructions: Optional first breadcrumb segment (e.g. “Educatie” or “Gratis tips”) before the Blog archive link.

fields.label: Show table of contents
fields.name: show_toc
fields.instructions: When off, the Inhoudsopgave block is hidden (author card still shows).

fields.label: Post Sections
fields.name: post_sections
fields.instructions: Optional sections below the blog content.

sub_fields.label: “For you” card heading
sub_fields.name: for_you_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Heading above the checklist with brand check icons.

sub_fields.label: “For you” list icon
sub_fields.name: for_you_list_icon
sub_fields.instructions: One icon for all rows in this card (optional; default check glyph).

sub_fields.label: “For you” lines
sub_fields.name: for_you_list
sub_fields.instructions: Each row shows a brand check icon in the front end.

sub_fields.label: “Not for you” card heading
sub_fields.name: not_for_you_heading
sub_fields.instructions: Heading above the list with rose X icons.

sub_fields.label: “Not for you” list icon
sub_fields.name: not_for_you_list_icon
sub_fields.instructions: One icon for all rows in this card (optional; default X glyph).

sub_fields.label: “Not for you” lines
sub_fields.name: not_for_you_list
sub_fields.instructions: Each row shows a rose X icon in the front end.

sub_fields.label: Portrait image
sub_fields.name: portrait_image
sub_fields.instructions: Right column photo over the brand gradient.

sub_fields.label: Panel overlay (optional)
sub_fields.name: panel_overlay
sub_fields.instructions: Optional texture or rings over the gradient (e.g. Figma decorative layer).

sub_fields.label: Footer message
sub_fields.name: footer_message
sub_fields.instructions: Left copy in the navy footer band.

sub_fields.label: Footer CTA link
sub_fields.name: cta_link
sub_fields.instructions: White pill button (use link title for the label).

sub_fields.label: Footer CTA trailing icon
sub_fields.name: cta_trailing_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional; defaults to circled arrow when empty.

sub_fields.label: Section background
sub_fields.name: section_background
sub_fields.instructions: White (default) or full-width navy behind the FAQ list and contact card.

sub_fields.label: Button label
sub_fields.name: cta_text
sub_fields.instructions: Shown on the wide navy pill. If empty, the link field’s title is used.

sub_fields.label: Trailing icon
sub_fields.name: trailing_icon
sub_fields.instructions: Optional graphic on the right of the pill (e.g. circled arrow). Leave empty for the default arrow.
